title: Interview: Working for Walt Disney
text:
Walt loved to work in
teams and we'd have many meetings where
an entire group of people get together
story men and animators and songwriters
and art background people and script
writers all bet together in one
room and talk about the
[Music]
project and he like to have everyone
contribute their ideas
and it was up to us to come up with
[Music]
something Walt had a very interesting
way of complimenting you he didn't ever
want to spoil you and make you feel too
cocky so all he'd ever say was that'll
work this is the way Walt was with all
his people he never actually directly
complimented you but you knew if he
didn't like it and the one thing he
hated was if somebody didn't like
something and didn't give any comment
about how to make it better how to
improve it because he wanted positive
thinkers he wanted people that were
plusy things a good idea he'd make it a
great idea never
failed but that's the way it was with
him he was like the bee buzzing around
all the flowers pollinating the flowers
taking a little honey from each of the
flowers and spreading it around
[Music]
